              def reconcile_invoice

                invoice.reload

                  invoice.update!(status: :paid)
          
      43.

                  AuditLog.log(recorded_by, "invoice.reconciled", invoice, { total_paid: total_paid.to_f })

                end

            # Deterministic fee calculation: subtotal, discount, net, per-installment.

    10. 
            

            
              
            

                def calculate(fee_assignment, late_fee_amount: nil)
          
      11. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    11. 
            

            
              
            

                  return Result.new(subtotal: 0, discount_amount: 0, discount_percent: 0, exempt: true, net_amount: 0, installment_count: 1, per_installment: 0, late_fee: 0) if fee_assignment.exempt?

      14.

                  discount_pct = (fee_assignment.discount_percent.presence || 0).to_d

      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16. 
            

            
              
            

                  discount_total = discount_amt + (base * discount_pct / 100)
          
      17. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    17. 
            

            
              
            

                  net = [ base - discount_total, 0 ].max
          
      18. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    18. 
            

            
              
            

                  installments = (fee_assignment.installment_count.presence || 1).to_i
          
      19. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    19. 
            

            
              
            

                  installments = 1 if installments < 1
          
      20.

                  per_installment = (net / installments).round(2)
          
      21.

                  late_fee = (late_fee_amount || 0).to_d

                # @param invoice [Invoice]

                  require "prawn"

    8.

      11. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    11. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Header
          
      12. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    12. 
            

            
              
            

                    doc.text "Invoice ##{invoice.id}", size: 20, style: :bold
          
      13. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    13. 
            

            
              
            

                    doc.move_down 4
          
      14. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    14.

      15. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    15. 
            

            
              
            

                    doc.move_down 16
          
      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      17. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    17. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Student & dates

                    doc.move_down 8

                    doc.text "Due date: #{invoice.due_date.strftime('%d %b %Y')}", size: 10

                    doc.move_down 16

                      ]

    35. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      36.

      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37.

    38. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      39.

    41.

                def number_to_currency(amount)

      7. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    7. 
            

            
              
            

                # @return [true] on success (or stub success)
          
      8. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    8. 
            

            
              
            

                def send_single(phone, message)
          
      9. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    9. 
            

            
              
            

                  return false if phone.blank?
          
      10. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    10. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      11. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    11. 
            

            
              
            

                  normalized = phone.to_s.strip
          
      12. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    12. 
            

            
              
            

                  return false if normalized.blank?
          
      13. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    13. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      14. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    14. 
            

            
              
            

                  if Rails.env.development?
          
      15. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    15. 
            

            
              
            

                    Rails.logger.info "[SmsService] Would send SMS to #{normalized}: #{message.truncate(80)}"
          
      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16. 
            

            
              
            

                    true
          
      17. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    17. 
            

            
              
            

                  else
          
      18. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    18. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Production: plug in Africastalking or other provider here.
          
      19. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    19. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Example: Africastalking::Sms.send(to: normalized, message: message)
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            
              
            

                    Rails.logger.info "[SmsService] Production stub: would send SMS to #{normalized}"
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            

            
              
            

                    true
          
      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      25. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    25. 
            

            
              
            

                # Send absence alert to all parents of the student who have a phone number.
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            
              
            

                # @param student [Student]
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            
              
            

                # @param date [Date]
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            
              
            

                # @return [Integer] number of messages sent (or stubbed)
          
      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            

            
              
            

                def send_absence_alert(student, date)
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30. 
            

            
              
            

                  return 0 unless student.present? && date.present?
          
      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      32. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    32. 
            

            
              
            

                  student_name = student.full_name
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            
              
            

                  message = "Learnexis: #{student_name} was marked absent on #{date.strftime('%d %b %Y')}. Please contact the school if you have questions."
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            
              
            

                  sent = 0
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            

            
              
            

                  student.parents.each do |parent|
          
      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37. 
            

            
              
            

                    next if parent.phone_number.blank?
          
      38. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    38. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      39. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    39. 
            

            
              
            

                    if send_single(parent.phone_number, message)
          
      40. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    40. 
            

            
              
            

                      sent += 1
          
      41. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    41. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      42. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    42. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      43. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    43. 
            

            
              
            

                  sent
          
      44. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    44. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      46. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    46. 
            

            
              
            

            end
          
      47.
